title: Tis But A Scratch
description: Disables the red tint overlay applied to entities when they take damage.
body:
# Tis But A Scratch
Entities, including players, will no longer flash red when they take damage.

Supports Minecraft versions 1.18 to 1.20.4. I'll happily update to future versions if people want it.
# Uses
- Pairs well with the [Blood and Gore](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blood-and-gore) mod to make a more immersive damage effect
  - _Note: Blood and Gore is only available for a select few Minecraft versions as of Jun 30 2023_
- Useful when you're using shaders, where the red flash can be quite distracting
